allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node,npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
